content:
# elizaos-plugins/registry Daily Update (Apr 12, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
The `elizaos-plugins/registry` repository underwent a significant cleanup on April 12, 2026. The primary focus was the closure of stale issues, outdated feature requests, and third-party plugin proposals to streamline the registry. Development efforts continue to emphasize modularity, with new plugin submissions encouraged to be hosted in independent repositories under the `elizaOS-plugins` organization.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS
*   **Plugin Registry Maintenance:** The repository underwent a comprehensive audit, resulting in the closure of numerous stale issues and third-party integration proposals to maintain a clean and actionable project scope.
*   **CLI and Scaffolding Updates:** Clarification was provided regarding the deprecation of the `elizaos` CLI scaffolding, with users directed to the official `elizaOS/examples` repository for project initialization.

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#337](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/pull/337): Add `@hashlock/plugin-hashlock`.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   **Stale and Outdated Requests:** A large volume of long-standing issues (8+ months old) were closed, including requests for V3 goals [#4720](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/issues/4720), security roles [#5386](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/issues/5386), and various platform-specific integrations like Pump.fun [#4908](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/issues/4908) and HyperEVM [#4909](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/issues/6161).
*   **Third-Party Plugin Proposals:** Multiple community proposals for new plugins and integrations—including AgentFolio [#6634](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/issues/6634), Pyrimid [#6668](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/issues/6668), and various identity/trust layers—were closed with instructions to develop them as independent npm packages under the `elizaOS-plugins` organization.

## NEW ISSUES
*   *None.*

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   [#6514](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/issues/6514) **Inter-Agent Coordination:** This thread features an extensive discussion on the challenges of multi-agent coordination. Participants (including `douglasborthwick-crypto`, `64R3N`, and `bobrenze-bot`) highlight the need for persistent peer relationships, behavioral history tracking (via WTRMRK), and on-chain credential verification (via InsumerAPI) to solve the "cold-start" problem for cross-instance agent communication.
*   [#6365](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/issues/6365) **AI Agent Payment Implementation:** A deep-dive discussion regarding payment infrastructure. Contributors from MAXIA, Coin Railz, and others debate the necessity of pre-transaction verification, identity layers, and trust-based spend limits for autonomous agents. The consensus points toward a multi-layered approach involving identity verification, sanctions screening, and graduated spend limits.
